top_tweets.text:
Supabase has raised $500M at a $10B valuation

In this round we are giving @supabase employees the opportunity to cash out 25% of their vested options. We have done this in every round since inception.

We do it as a “cashless transaction” so that employees don’t need to front https://t.co/B6BBqb6qxM
top_tweets.author: kiwicopple
top_tweets.name: Paul Copplestone - e/postgres
top_tweets.summary_zh: Supabase 宣布以 100 億美元估值完成 5 億美元融資，並在每輪融資中都讓員工以「無現金交易」方式套現 25% 已歸屬期權，員工無需自掏腰包即可實現部分股權變現。

top_tweets.text:
Here's how I avoid these:

- Don't use GPT 5.5 to start a design
- Always use an image reference or site url
- Never prompt without a taste skill or DESIGN.md
- Set up design rules in AGENTS.md
- Get familiar with their names so you can change them
top_tweets.author: MengTo
top_tweets.name: Meng To
top_tweets.summary_zh: 作者分享如何避免 AI 設計產出劣質結果：不用 GPT 直接開始設計、永遠使用圖像參考或網址、設定 taste skill 或 DESIGN.md、在 AGENTS.md 中建立設計規則，並熟悉元件命名以便修改。

top_tweets.text:
Cursor is hiring design engineers.

looking for people with taste, systems thinking, and deep care for fast, polished experiences – especially folks excited to build the tools that help designers, engineers, and agents ship quality code.

know someone? tag them or DM me 📧
top_tweets.author: ryolu_
top_tweets.name: Ryo Lu
top_tweets.summary_zh: Cursor 正在招募 design engineer，尋找具備品味、系統思維與對速度和打磨體驗有深度在意的人才，特別歡迎想打造幫助設計師、工程師與 AI agent 產出高品質程式碼工具的人選。

top_tweets.text: iOS 26’s Liquid Glass design is slowly taking over third-party apps. ✨ https://t.co/hIiovSKQct
top_tweets.author: ApplesClubs
top_tweets.name: Apple Club
top_tweets.summary_zh: iOS 26 的 Liquid Glass 設計語言正逐漸被第三方 app 採用，視覺風格開始在生態系中擴散。

top_tweets.author: BearDesignX
top_tweets.name: Bear Design
top_tweets.summary_zh: 以圖像對比「完美主義」與「We ball」心態，提醒設計師不必過度追求完美、有時放手執行更有效率。

top_tweets.author: BearDesignX
top_tweets.name: Bear Design
top_tweets.summary_zh: 作者分享一個實用的設計資源或工具（推文本身未附詳細說明，但被標註為「incredibly useful」）。

top_tweets.text: Big brush strokes solve more than you think 🎨🌊 https://t.co/W30huupBZP
top_tweets.author: BearDesignX
top_tweets.name: Bear Design
top_tweets.summary_zh: 以「大筆觸能解決的問題比你想像的多」為主題，鼓勵設計師在創作時勇於使用大膽筆觸，不拘泥細節。

criteria.score_formula: likes（主要）+ Claude 人工過濾廣告/招聘/meme/非設計
claude_filter_rules: 排除純廣告、招聘文（有洞見的 JD 除外）
排除與產品設計/PM 無關（crypto、體育、政治等）
排除 meme/搞笑但無內容
偏好有觀點的原創內容

top_products.title: Split Ninja
top_products.author: Rino Wu
top_products.tagline: Cut, extract, mute, and split videos locally
top_products.summary_zh: 在本地端進行影片剪輯、片段提取、靜音與分割的工具，適合需要快速處理影片的使用者。

top_products.title: PlugTalk
top_products.author: Thành Đạt Nguyễn
top_products.tagline: Your Mac talks back when you plug things in
top_products.summary_zh: 當你在 Mac 上插拔裝置時，系統會發出語音回饋的小工具。

top_products.title: Basedash Semantic Layer
top_products.author: Max Musing
top_products.tagline: Define metrics once. Use them everywhere.
top_products.summary_zh: 讓數據團隊只需定義一次指標（metrics），即可在所有系統中重複使用的語意層工具。

top_products.title: Keen Code
top_products.author: Mottakin Chowdhury
top_products.tagline: A context-efficient CLI coding agent built by agents
top_products.summary_zh: 一個由 AI 代理建構的命令列編碼助手，強調高效利用上下文資訊。

top_products.title: Perplexity Personal Computer for Windows
top_products.author: Rohan Chaubey
top_products.tagline: Run AI agents across your local files and apps on Windows
top_products.summary_zh: 在 Windows 系統上運行 AI 代理，讓其能存取並操作本地檔案與應用程式。

top_products.title: Walrus Memory
top_products.author: Abner Pinto
top_products.tagline: Enable agents to keep context & work across apps + sessions
top_products.summary_zh: 為 AI 代理提供跨應用程式與工作階段的記憶與上下文保存功能。
